description_long: This is a stylized, cartoon-like mallet with a cylindrical wooden head featuring carved grooves and metallic bands on both ends. The metallic bands are adorned with evenly spaced, raised diamond-shaped studs, giving the hammer a reinforced appearance. One striking face of the mallet displays a large, yellow five-pointed star set against a red circular background, adding a decorative or emblematic touch. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of the same wood as the head, with a smooth finish and no visible grip enhancements. The overall design is playful and exaggerated, suggesting it may be intended for theatrical, ceremonial, or toy-like use rather than heavy-duty construction. The hammer is clean and shows no signs of wear, damage, or branding.
description: A stylized wooden mallet with a cylindrical head, metallic studded bands, and a prominent yellow star on one striking face. The handle is long, straight, and smooth, matching the wooden head.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical wooden head with carved grooves and metallic studded bands, and the straight wooden handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow star emblem on the striking face, surrounded by a red background and metallic band.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the mallet, showing the plain wooden head and metallic band without the star emblem.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the star-emblazoned striking face and the length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Cylindrical wooden mallet head with metallic studded bands on both ends; one striking face features a large yellow star on a red background.
